---
format: 
  html:
    theme: meds-website-styles.scss
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
    smooth-scroll: true
---

## {{< fa tv title="slides" >}} Intro slides {#slides}

We'll start by familiarizing ourselves with some important terminology and concepts. You can access the Google Slides below:

::: {.center-text}
[{{< fa tv title="A television screen" >}} slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1Q7PZRSdZFcdeg-N73ibxHnAbVq-8uFhD5KHtr8SkNXI/edit?usp=sharing){.btn role="button" target="_blank"} 
:::
